name: PT Darmi Bersaudara Tbk
summary: PT Darmi Bersaudara Tbk primarily engages in the trading of processed wood products in Indonesia. It offers raw wood, as well as various types of processed wood, such as Merbau, Bengkirai, Kampoor, Keruing, and Meranti for use in decking, E2E, T&G, flooring, door jamb, post beam, finger joint, and window jamb applications. The company also exports its products to China, Nepal, India, Australia, and Europe. PT Darmi Bersaudara Tbk was founded in 1998 and is based in Surabaya, Indonesia.
